<!-- PAGE: 1 -->

# Performance Assessment of PPP-B2b Service

Alice Wang, Bob Li

## Abstract

This paper assesses the performance of BDS-3 PPP-B2b service for real-time positioning in the Asia-Pacific region.

<!-- PAGE: 2 -->

## Data and Products

We compared PPP-B2b products with IGS Real-Time Service (RTS) products. The IGS RTS products were accessed via NTRIP from CDDIS. The CLK93 stream was used for orbit and clock corrections. Note: The PPP-B2b products were downloaded from the BDS official website as offline files and replayed during post-processing.

<!-- PAGE: 3 -->

## Results

The positioning accuracy using IGS RTS products is 5 cm in horizontal and 8 cm in vertical. The B2b offline products show similar performance with 6 cm horizontal and 10 cm vertical accuracy.
